description_long: This object consists of three modern residential houses arranged side by side, each with distinct architectural features and landscaping. The houses feature flat and slightly sloped roofs, large windows, and a mix of exterior materials including concrete, glass, and wood. Each house has a small front yard with greenery, pathways, and some decorative elements such as shrubs and trees. The facades display a combination of neutral colors, with accents of black, white, and gray, and some houses have rooftop terraces or balconies. The window arrangements are asymmetrical, with some large picture windows and others in vertical strips. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A group of three modern houses with flat and sloped roofs, large windows, and landscaped front yards, featuring a mix of concrete, glass, and wood in neutral tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facades of all three houses, their entryways, landscaping, and large windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyards, rear facades, and some rooftop features of the houses.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the houses, side windows, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the roof structures, terraces, and the layout of the houses on their lots.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryways with flat doors, small steps, and landscaped paths; no prominent porches or columns.
